name: Rand Paul for President
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot,
It's been an incredible honor to run a
principled campaign for the White House. Today, I will end where
I began, ready and willing to fight for the cause of Liberty.

Across the country thousands upon thousands
of young people flocked to our message of limited government,
privacy, criminal justice reform and a reasonable foreign policy.
Brushfires of Liberty were ignited, and those will carry on, as
will I.

Although, today I will suspend my campaign
for President, the fight is far from over. I will continue to
carry the torch for Liberty in the United States Senate and I
look forward to earning the privilege to represent the people of
Kentucky for another term.

Thank you for all of your support.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

DONATE TO LIBERTY
TODAY >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

subject: Re: huge phone call

body:
Ted has been trying to reach you. I hope that you will read Ted's email below -- it's very time sensitive! |
Friend,

**Ted has been trying to reach you.** I hope that you will read Ted's email below -- it's very time sensitive!

**A few very generous donors have stepped up to match all our online donations made through the links below -- but it's only good for less than 24 hours.**

By now, I'm sure you've heard about Ted's amazing victory in Iowa.

[**If you haven't given in the last 24 hours -- this email is especially for you.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300639:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)

Despite the attacks from Donald Trump and Marco Rubio, the D.C. Lobbyists, and the liberal media...Ted won a huge victory in Iowa. As Ted said Monday night, **it's because of people like you that the media, the lobbyists, and the Washington Cartel are NOT going to choose our nominee.**

**This is our time!**

The people of America -- people like you and me -- are going to pick the next President of the United States.

We have the power to win -- but it will only happen if we step up and demand our country back.

That is why this special matching opportunity is so important. Will you click this instant matching link below and double your impact today?

[**48 HOUR DOUBLE MATCH: Match My Gift Today >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300639:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)

I know I don't have to tell you...this is a huge opportunity for both you and me.

[**Please, can I count on you to respond right away?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300639:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r) Any amount helps, and with just days before the next votes are to be cast -- Ted needs every last ounce of support he can get.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

Heidi

* * *
From: ted@tedcruz.org
Sent: Tuesday, February 2nd
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: huge phone call

|
---

| Friend,

_I can't wait_ to tell you about the phone call I received.

I just got off the phone with a few very generous supporters who -- after our big win in Iowa last night -- have pledged huge support for my campaign. **

For the next 48 hours, these most generous supporters have agreed to match all online donations to my campaign made through the links below.**

Because you have been one of my most loyal supporters -- I'm reaching out to you first.

[**48 HOUR DOUBLE MATCH: click here to chip in >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300639:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)

You see: these generous supporters know how hard the next few days will be and how important it is to continue the momentum we received from Iowa.

Here is what they know:

1) **I will never get -- nor do I want -- money from the D.C. lobbyists** or the special interest billionaires; and

2) **After winning Iowa -- the Washington Cartel is most certainly more determined than ever to defeat me.** Their attacks are only going to increase in the weeks to come.

That is why these supporters have made me a special offer, but it is up to you to help me take advantage.

**How it works:** for the next 48 hours -- generous donors have offered to match ALL online donations made through the links below in this email.

**Friend, this is the biggest boost you can give my campaign when we need it most!**

Let me explain how special this is: **your contribution of $25 will be matched to become $50,** $50 will be worth $100, _**and $500 will become $1,000**_ \-- your immediate donation will be worth double the original amount.

Below are special links for you to use and have your donation doubled BUT it will only work for the next 48 hours. So time is critical!

**[Donate $10, see it matched to become $20 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300640:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)

[Donate $25, have it matched to become $50 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300641:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)

[Donate $50, see it matched to become $100 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300642:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)

[Donate $100, it will be matched to become $200 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300643:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)

[Donate $500, it will double to become $1000 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33300644:syD8LNCpN:m:1:1104269936:F570091E50AC78938C4E30228791C2F4:r)**

_**Again, this special matching offer is only good for 48 hours.
**_
I can't win these primaries without your support.

**Friend, our victory in Iowa will be wasted if we can't capitalize on our momentum as we move onward to the next contests in New Hampshire, South Carolina, and beyond.**

Last night, we showed America that only the power of the grassroots will ultimately defeat the Washington Cartel.

Friend, with your support, we can win this.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

This is an important election, and I did not take this decision lightly.** There are a number of good candidates on our side, but I am voting for Marco Rubio as our next president because he will not only restore our great nation -- he will take us into a New American Century. I'm proud to stand with Marco as part of the next generation of conservatives. Marco has a proven conservative record of standing up to the Washington establishment and pursuing conservative solutions for the 21st Century. And that's exactly the type of leader we need in the White House next year. Marco needs our help to win. His campaign is fueled by supporters like you. Politics is a nasty business. It's why so many Americans, including me, have been disillusioned.

Personal ambition and conflict are often valued more than honesty, substance and solutions.

**It was yet another example of creating rather than reporting the news, and it's wrong.**

\-- Juanita, SEIU member_ Friend --

The energy in Love Park was absolutely electric. **On Monday, the Service Employees International Union (SEIU)** \-- representing 80,000 health care, property services, and public service sector employees here in Pennsylvania -- **proudly endorsed Katie McGinty for U.S. Senate**.

This endorsement was personal for Katie. As the daughter of a police officer and a restaurant hostess, she's stood up her whole life for hardworking, middle class families just like the one she came from. That's why SEIU and their members are so proud to stand by her in this campaign.

[**Check out the excitement from the event over on our Facebook photo album >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3794399122623037440/-5164199407477850112?set=a.880245238763360.1073741844.414340492020506&type=3)

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: What's next:
body:
No one imagined we'd have the strength we've had. And this race is just beginning. Friend, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for the incredible effort, time, and resources you've invested in me and this campaign. No one imagined this campaign would have the indomitable strength and spirit that we've had over the last nine months. No one but you. And this race is just beginning. On Monday night, we outperformed everyone's expectations. We beat two big-name governors--John Kasich and Chris Christie--and we beat the last two winners of the Iowa caucuses. We tied for delegates with two deep-pocketed favorites: Jeb Bush and Rand Paul. Our goal has always been: defy expectations, and move on to the next fight. Unlike my opponents who bet big on Iowa or New Hampshire, our campaign has never been staked on just one state, or one primary, or one day. We've built a campaign that's strong in all 50 states. We've built a campaign that can run a marathon, not a sprint. We're in this fight for the long haul. When we started back in May, I was 17 out of 16: no one even asked my name in polls. The pundits who did talk about me said I wouldn't last long. They underestimated us even after we won the first debate and the second debate. They underestimated us even when we outlasted the biggest names in politics, as Scott Walker, Rand Paul, Mike Huckabee, Rick Perry, George Pataki, Bobby Jindal, and Lindsey Graham each faltered. But if there's one thing you learn as a woman entering corporate business in the 1970s, it's that being told "no" cannot make you give up. It cannot render you silent. It cannot make you feel powerless, or afraid, or intimidated. Instead, the word "no" must give you the strength to reject the status quo. It must instill in you the courage to speak out against the powerful. And it must fill you with the resolve to continue to fight, no matter what the circumstances. Today, that's exactly what I intend to keep doing in this race. The pundits will continue to underestimate me moving forward. And they will continue to underestimate you, too. They want you to believe this race has already been decided for you, by just one state's voters. They want you to believe that your voice and your opinion is now meaningless and without value. They want you to believe that there are only three people left in this race: a reality TV star who's gone bankrupt four times, and two career politicians who will say anything to win themselves a bigger office and a better title. Just like they always do, the pundits and the political class have it wrong. Your voice still matters. Your strength and resolve in this fight still matters. And we can still solve our nation's problems: with leadership, with integrity, and with the backbone to keep on fighting. My commitment to you remains the same as it's always been: I will not falter. I will not give up. And I will not stop fighting until the citizens of all 50 states have made our voices heard. Thank you so much for fighting alongside me. And thank you so much for your continued faith and support. All my best, Carly

**[Unsubscribe](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/u/127VSVllXawMF3)**

In America the air you breathe and the water you drink should not depend on your income, race or ethnicity.
